title: User can reset password via email link
description: As a user who forgot my password, I want to request a reset link to my registered email so that I can regain access. The link must be single-use and expire in 30 minutes.
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid email, when the user submits the reset form, then a confirmation message is shown (regardless of whether the account exists).
Given a valid reset link, when the user opens it, then they see a 'Set new password' form.
Given an expired or used reset link, when the user opens it, then an error 'This reset link is no longer valid' is shown.
Given a new password meeting policy (>= 12 chars, 1 number, 1 symbol), when the user submits, then they are logged in and redirected to /dashboard.
